title: Implementing Benjamin Graham's Special Situations Frameworks in Conventional Investment Strategies
description:
Join Prof. Sanjay Bakshi in this deep dive into the world of Special Situations, a framework originally pioneered by Benjamin Graham in the legendary third edition of Security Analysis. Prof. Bakshi shares his personal evolution as an investor—from navigating the technicalities of risk arbitrage and corporate events like mergers and buybacks to applying these "event-driven" principles to modern, long-term business analysis.
In this session, you will explore:
- The transition from being a market analyst to a business analyst.
- How to apply probabilistic thinking and stress tests to companies facing temporary distress.
- The concept of "Saraswati over Lakshmi," emphasizing the accumulation of knowledge as a permanent competitive advantage.
Whether you are interested in deep value, special situations, or the psychology of investing, this talk offers a masterclass in disciplined thinking.

About the Speaker: 
Prof. Sanjay Bakshi is a Distinguished Adjunct Professor of Finance at FLAME University and the Managing Partner at ValueQuest Capital LLP. A renowned practitioner and teacher of value investing for over 25 years, he is widely recognized for his expertise in behavioral finance and multidisciplinary thinking. He holds an M.Sc. in Economics from the London School of Economics and is a Fellow of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India. Often referred to as the "Fundoo Professor," he is celebrated by students and the investing community for his ability to blend academic rigor with real-world investment wisdom.
Date of session: Saturday, 2 August, 2025

00:00:00 - Introduction and Guest Welcome
00:02:54 - Graham’s 3rd Edition "Hunting Grounds"
00:08:39 - Defining Special Situation Events
00:10:55 - The Graham Risk-Reward Formula
00:12:06 - Masterclass in Probabilistic Thinking
00:26:53 - Realities of Arbitrage Hedging Operations 
00:29:10 - Appeal of Special Situations per Benjamin Graham
00:54:00 - Learning from Buffett: Shifting from Arbitrage to Businesses
01:08:59 - Lessons from Risk Arbitrage
01:12:06 - Exploiting Short-term Market Inefficiencies
01:33:10 - Lessons from the Castrol Case
01:44:11 - Learnings from Buffett and Munger (with case studies)
02:01:12 - Anchoring to Business Fundamentals
02:02:05 - Examples from own journey
02:27:11 - Investing During the Pandemic
02:33:43 - India's microfinance industry 
02:43:37 - Navigating Political and Regulatory Risks
02:53:24 - Analyst vs. Business Analyst Mindset
02:56:00 - Outcome vs Process focus
02:59:46 - Chase Knowledge not money
03:06:10 - Q&A
03:53:16 - Closing Remarks 



The Indian Association of Investment Professionals (IAIP), the India Society of CFA Institute, was established in Apr 2005 as an association of local investment professionals consisting of portfolio managers, security analysts, investment advisors and other financial professionals.

As one of the over 160 CFA Institute member societies, the IAIP connects local CFA Institute members to a global network of investment professionals. For the continuing up-gradation of knowledge and skills of members, IAIP conducts speaker events, workshops led by leading finance professionals.

Whereas goddess Laxmi represents wealth and prosperity. One big lesson is this. If you pursue Sarasati that is knowledge wholeheartedly, Laxshmi that is wealth will become jealous and follow you. Devotion to knowledge eventually attracts wealth. A popular parable retold by Deepak Chopra illustrates this point. A young man asked a spiritual master for a secret to unlimited wealth and success in helping the world. The master answers, "There are two goddesses that reside in the heart. Lakshmi, the goddess of wealth and Sarasati, the goddess of knowledge. Both are loved, but you must pay more attention to Sarasati. Pursue her, love her and give her your focus. If you do so, Laxshmi will become jealous and pay more attention to you. The more you seek knowledge, the more wealth will seek you. Lakshmi will follow you wherever you go and never leave you granting you prosperity. For an investor, chasing Lak Saraswati means prioritizing learning and insight over immediate profit. It means that when researching companies or industries, your first goal is to gain an understanding, not just hunt for the next quick trade. Embracing the Sarasati over Lakshmi framework can change how one approaches investing day-to-day. title: MASTERCLASS on Value Investing with Prof. Sanjay Bakshi | RARE INTERVIEW!
description:
Manish Chokhani Reveals The Secret to Winning in Volatile Markets : https://youtu.be/kvnH9SKKp6s

From debt-ridden childhood to build ₹300 crore stockbroking firm—an untold story of grit and markets : https://youtu.be/ZVPR6u-TCQ0

In today’s rare and unmissable episode, we are joined by Professor Sanjay Bakshi — one of India’s most profound value investing thinkers, celebrated teacher, and master of integrating behavioral finance, stoic philosophy, and spiritual wisdom into investment decision-making.

For over two decades, Prof. Bakshi has influenced generations of investors through his multidisciplinary lens, unique mental models, and deeply reflective thinking. In this conversation, we explore how public market investing differs from venture capital, how to judge durability in businesses, and what makes a company an outlier.

We also go deep into Charlie Munger’s influence, why scarcity is not all equal, and how you can develop the ability to think laterally and make better decisions — not just as an investor but as a leader, founder, or operator.

🔔 Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more thought-provoking conversations with India’s top economic and financial minds.

Special mention to our venue partner - The Quorum Club, Mumbai

#SanjayBakshi #ValueInvesting #MentalModels #IndiaOpportunity #BehavioralFinance #LongTermThinking #Stoicism #CharlieMunger #PublicMarkets #InvestmentWisdom 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

⚠️ Disclaimer:
The information provided on The India Opportunity with Shrishti Sahu channel is for general informational purposes only. 

Our guests share their views in good faith. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or validity of any information shared. Viewers are encouraged to conduct their own due diligence before acting on any ideas presented. 

The India Opportunity accepts no responsibility for any direct, indirect, or other damages arising from reliance on the content of this video. The content is not intended to offend, create rumors, or disrespect any person, community, or belief. 

Please consult appropriate professionals before making decisions based on this content. By watching, you acknowledge that you are solely responsible for your own interpretation and use of the information.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Welcome to The India Opportunity Podcast, hosted by Shrishti Sahu. This channel provides a front-row seat to the visionaries shaping India's future, unlocking the country's immense potential through engaging conversations and inspiring stories.

About Shrishti Sahu:
Shrishti Sahu is a 3rd generation entrepreneur and the Managing Partner of Swadharma Source Ventures (SSV). With a robust background in startups, private equity, and technology, Shrishti has led investments in over 60 companies. Prior to her role at SSV, she founded a fintech company and served at Meta (formerly Facebook), where she headed startup programs. Her passion for fostering innovation and supporting the next generation of leaders drives her commitment to showcasing the stories that define India's entrepreneurial landscape.

Subscribe to stay updated on the latest episodes and be inspired by the incredible potential of India!

The Indian Association of Investment Professionals (IAIP), the India Society of CFA Institute, was established in Apr 2005 as an association of local investment professionals consisting of portfolio managers, security analysts, investment advisors and other financial professionals.

As one of the over 140 CFA Institute member societies, the IAIP connects local CFA Institute members to a global network of investment professionals. For the continuing up-gradation of knowledge and skills of members, IAIP conducts speaker events, workshops led by leading finance professionals.

title: Masterclass With Sanjay Bakshi | ‘Bear Markets Make Great Businesses Attractively Priced’ | ET Now
description:
Sanjay Bakshi discusses his entry into value investing, focusing on his strategies of identifying undervalued companies with strong fundamentals, long-term growth potential, and a focus on intrinsic value over market trends.

We provide detailed analysis of the latest business news, trends, union budget, and financial strategies to help you succeed in today’s competitive market. Our coverage includes all the latest updates from the share market, with expert insights on which stocks to buy and sell. Additionally, we bring you the most up-to-date coverage of the Budget 2025, from pre-budget discussions to the big announcements on D-day. Stay informed with all the latest updates on Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman's plans and industry expectations. Stay tuned to our channel for all the crucial updates!

title: Platform Delusion: How Moats Get Destroyed ft. Prof Sanjay Bakshi @fundooprofessor #investing

A snippet from  Episode 1 of Investing कारवां (20th May 2022) with Prof Sanjay Bakshi ( @fundooprofessor ).

MissioN SMILE is a community of individual investors who learn about investing together by sharing their learnings.

MissioN SMILE : https://missionsmile.smartsyncservices.com/

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
About Smart Sync Services: 
Founded in 2017, Smart Sync Services is a SEBI Registered Investment Advisory Firm striving to make the investment journey toward financial freedom simpler for individual investors. SSS offers fee-based Equity Advisory, Model Portfolio, and Financial Planning Services for retail and HNIs. 

Moreover, SSS also provides its members with a learning platform, MissioN SMILE, which aims to harness the community with the required financial and behavioral tools. Armoring members with these tools of knowledge and wisdom can sustainably lead them toward speedy financial freedom. This enables them to guide their members on how to avoid financial imprisonment and give them control over their finances and life choices.
